protected_insert_path.core_db: insert_open_trade() uses BEGIN IMMEDIATE, pre-check SELECT on market_slug/status='open', and catches sqlite3.IntegrityError on the live unique index.
protected_insert_path.bot_core: main bot open flow and model bridge flow both call insert_open_trade(trade, sport=SPORT) and log OPEN SKIPPED / BRIDGE OPEN SKIPPED when duplicate protection fires.

log_summary: Recent bot log shows repeated 'BRIDGE SKIP - at capacity (3/3)' entries, indicating the running stack is respecting configured capacity and not opening additional positions while full.
Observed close/open sequence around 2026-04-07 15:50-15:51: trade 142 closed, then trade 145 opened for a different slug. No duplicate-open pair for the same market_slug was observed.
No fresh log evidence in the inspected window showed two OPEN events for the same market_slug while both remained open.
evidence.capacity_status: Within limit. runtime/state.json reports slots.open=3 and slots.max=3, matching .env MAX_CONCURRENT_TRADES=3 and DB open_row_count=3.

notes: Verification used live DB schema inspection, current open-row queries, current runtime state, and recent launcher/bot logs.
A small read-only helper script was used only to query SQLite in read-only mode and print evidence. No production data was modified.
